name: Cardboard Box
description: Home is where you put it. Right now, it's cardboard.

name: Weathered Tent
description: Keeps the rain out. Mostly. Wind negotiations ongoing.

name: Wooden Hut
description: Four walls and a fireplace. Genuine shelter at last.

name: Stone Manor
description: Cut stone, high ceilings, and walls that remember.

name: Glass Castle
description: Light passes through every room. Impractically perfect.
